title: KandyToys M.Y Family 2 Player Badminton Garden Games Set including Rackets & Shuttlecock
features: The KandyToys M.Y Badminton Garden Games Set is perfect for at home or in the park!
The two included rackets are perfect for both kids and adults to try their hand at Badminton
The set includes everything you need to get started: 2 Rackets; 1 Shuttlecock
A Classic garden game suitable for beginners and seasoned pros.
description: Product Description 2 Player Badminton Set including 2 Safety Warning Suitable for ages 3+
